para_trans: Growth Hub Regulatory Board on Mumbai Metropolitan Region Economic Master Plan
Madame Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk, Mumbai-400 032.
Read: - 1) Department of Planning, Government Decision No.NITIA-2023 / Q.No. 26 / Q. 1412, D. October 5, 2023.
2) Department of Planning, Government Decision No.NITIA-2023 / Q. No. 26 / Q. 1412, D. September 10, 2024.
NITI Aayog is promoting economic growth for select sectors across the country through this concept called G-HUB.
A policy has been formulated. Accordingly, for the implementation of the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Economic Master Plan.
At the State Government level vide Government Decision dated 10th September, 2024. Presided over by the Chief Minister
A 'Growth Hub Regulatory Board' has been set up.
The Growth Hub Regulatory Board, constituted under the chairmanship of Hon'ble Chief Minister, Shri. 10
In the Government Decision dated September, 2024, Paragraph No. The Growth Hub Regulatory Board in Table 2 after No. 9
A. No.9 (a) at Ma. The Minister of State (Urban Development) is being inducted.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
